comment: Single source of truth for the third-party components vendored under this directory. tools/vendor_notices.py generates THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md from this file, and the viewer's About panel reads it via the server (repo-version.ts). To re-pin a component: `python tools/vendor_notices.py set-version <id> <version>`, then `fetch-license <id>`, then `generate`, then refresh the asset files (e.g. tools/fetch_treesitter_assets.sh).

components.name: KaTeX
components.description: Renders the book's math (macros extracted from macros.tex) in the viewer's marker titles and infoview. The vendored CSS was trimmed to reference only the woff2 fonts below.

components.name: KaTeX fonts
components.description: The KaTeX web fonts (woff2), derived from the MathJax/TeX fonts. Licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1, separately from the MIT-licensed KaTeX library above.

components.name: pdf.js
components.description: Renders the book PDF in the viewer's PDF pane. The distributed files also retain their Apache-2.0 notice inline (@licstart … @licend).

components.name: web-tree-sitter
components.description: The tree-sitter syntax-highlighting runtime (WASM) the source panes load.

components.name: tree-sitter-markdown
components.description: Markdown grammar (block + inline) and highlight queries for the md pane.

components.name: tree-sitter-lean
components.description: Lean grammar and highlight queries for the lean pane.
